name: NEOM — Design Standards & Net-Zero Sustainability
name_ar: نيوم — معايير التصميم والاستدامة بصفر صافي
standard: NEOM Design Standards (THE LINE / Oxagon / Trojena / Sindalah / Magna) + NEOM Building Code (Net-Zero)
regulator: NEOM Authority — Urban Planning & Design Office
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check submittals against the NEOM design-standards portfolio. NEOM mandates net-zero embodied + operational carbon, no internal-combustion vehicles inside developments, '15-minute city' walkability radius (everything within 5-min walk of THE LINE Vertical Module), 100% renewable energy supply, zero-waste-to-landfill targets, biodiversity protection at the Tabuk fringe, and a NEOM-Authority-internal approval chain that supersedes MoMRAH for NEOM territory. Subzone-aware: rules differentiate THE LINE (vertical) vs Oxagon (port/industrial) vs Trojena (mountain/winter sports) vs Sindalah (luxury island) vs Magna (Gulf of Aqaba coast).
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لمعايير تصميم نيوم — صفر صافي كربون، عدم استخدام محركات الاحتراق الداخلي، مدينة الخمس عشرة دقيقة، طاقة متجددة 100%، وموافقات هيئة نيوم.
